subject.description: A weathered brass megaphone sitting upright on a wooden market stall table. Behind it, a blurred crowd of people walking past in a busy street market. One person in the mid-ground has stopped and turned back, looking directly toward the megaphone. The person is a woman in her 30s, dark hair, wearing a casual jacket, caught mid-turn with genuine curiosity on her face.
subject.action: The megaphone sits still. The woman is mid-turn, weight shifting on her back foot, head rotated toward the camera, eyes locked on something that caught her attention.

setting.location: A busy outdoor European street market with canvas awnings, wooden stalls, and crowds moving in both directions. Warm-toned buildings in the far background.
setting.time_of_day: Golden hour, late afternoon sun cutting horizontally through the market.

composition.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly wide shot. Megaphone in the left third of the frame, the turning woman in the right third.
composition.framing: Wide shot. Rule of thirds. Megaphone anchors the left, turning woman anchors the right. Crowd fills the middle as blur. Plenty of headspace above the woman.

lighting.type: Golden hour natural sunlight cutting horizontally through the scene, casting long warm shadows across the cobblestones. Backlit crowd creates rim lighting on hair and shoulders.
lighting.color_grading: Warm amber tones, cinematic teal shadows, protected warm skin tones on the turning woman.

mood: The electric moment of connection in a sea of noise. One message reaching the right person while everyone else walks past oblivious.
aesthetic_style: 8K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Shot on Canon EOS R5. Cinematic color grade with warm amber highlights and cool teal shadows.
